title: Disk Cleanup
description: The staging log partition is nearly full of fake rotated logs. Find the largest files, remove enough data, and free space so monitoring can resume.
tasks: SSH into the lab using the Lab Terminal
Check disk usage under /var/log/staging with df and du
Identify the largest fake log files
Delete enough logs to free meaningful space on the staging partition

objectivesPublic.label: SSH into the lab
objectivesPublic.text: Connect from the Lab Terminal using your session credentials.
objectivesPublic.hint: Use the lab panel credentials with the integrated terminal.

objectivesPublic.label: Free enough disk space on staging
objectivesPublic.text: Find what is filling /var/log/staging and remove enough to satisfy the cleanup check.
objectivesPublic.hint: Compare filesystem usage with per-directory sizes — training logs here are safe to delete when obviously oversized.

questions.prompt: Which command summarizes disk usage per file or directory?
